---
title: "Take-home Exercises"
listing:
  contents: "Take-home*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description]
---

This section contains take-home assignments for ISSS608.

## Assignments

- [Take-home Exercise 1](Take-home_Ex01/Take-home_Ex01.qmd) \| [Presentation](Take-home_Ex01/Take-home_Ex01_presentation.qmd)
- [Take-home Exercise 2](Take-home_Ex02/Take-home_Ex02.qmd)
